title: Structured JSON request logging via Pino (one line per request)
description: Coord coord-ac249ad6. Goal: Every API request emits exactly one structured JSON log line via Pino. Required fields: method, path, status, durationMs, requestId. Constraints: use Pino; emit exactly one log line per request. Non-goals: no body logging, no header logging. Success: exactly one valid JSON line per request with all required fields; unique requestId per request; automated test coverage via node --test.

title: Add Pino request-logging middleware to app.js

title: Structured JSON request logging via Pino (one line per request)
description:
Coord coord-2297190f.

GOAL: Every inbound request emits exactly one structured JSON log line via Pino containing method, path, status code, duration in milliseconds, and request id.

NON-GOALS:
- Logging request or response bodies
- Logging request or response headers

CONSTRAINTS:
- Use Pino as the logging library
- Run tests with the node --test built-in runner

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- Exactly one valid JSON log line is emitted per request
- Every request receives a unique request id
- The logging behavior is covered by a node --test suite
